summary: Recording has conflicting reports—one reviewer finds only static while another praises the 5.1 surround quality; no musical details available
review: The two reviews are at odds: one claims the tracks contain only static and should be removed, rating it poorly, whereas the other highlights excellent multi‑channel sound that shines on a DTS or Dolby 5.1 system. No comments on performance were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Average star rating (3) with contradictory feedback; limited data prevents a higher confidence assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: One reviewer reports only static/no audio, while another notes high‑quality multi‑channel FLAC that requires a 5.1 surround setup.
